description_zh: 维斯特洛大陆，七大王国争夺铁王座。血与火的征服，权力与背叛的游戏，凛冬将至的预言。龙、异鬼、三眼乌鸦，谁将坐上铁王座？
description_en: The Seven Kingdoms of Westeros torn by civil war. Dragons, White Walkers, and the Three-Eyed Raven. Play the game of thrones - you win or you die. Winter is coming.

gameplay_pacing.quest_structure: Multi-threaded storylines, player choices heavily affect outcomes
chapter_milestones: Chapter 1: The King's Arrival - Robert Baratheon visits Winterfell, Jon Arryn's murder
Chapter 2: King's Landing - Political intrigue, Ned's investigation, Joffrey's cruelty
Chapter 3: War of Five Kings - Ned's execution triggers civil war
Chapter 4: Battles and Betrayals - Robb's victories, Red Wedding, Purple Wedding
Chapter 5: Dragons Rise - Daenerys builds power in Essos, frees slaves
Chapter 6: The Long Night - White Walkers invade, Battle of Winterfell
Chapter 7: The Last War - Daenerys vs Cersei, King's Landing burns
Chapter 8: A Dream of Spring - Who sits the Iron Throne? (Multiple endings)

death_system.description: ANY character can die permanently based on choices. Major characters are NOT safe.
death_system.resurrection: Only via Red Priests (very rare, requires Lord of Light's favor)
death_system.consequences: Death of key allies changes entire storyline

house_selection.description: Choose your Great House - each has unique strengths, weaknesses, and starting position

houses.name: House Lannister
houses.words: Hear Me Roar (unofficial: A Lannister Always Pays His Debts)

houses.name: House Martell
houses.sigil: Red sun pierced by golden spear

role_options: Bastard (Jon Snow path - can rise to power)

dragons.description: Three dragon eggs hatched by Daenerys - Drogon, Rhaegal, Viserion
dragons.player_access: Only if playing Targaryen or bonding with wild dragon

white_walkers.description: Ancient ice demons from beyond the Wall, leading army of undead
abilities: Immune to normal weapons (dragonglass/Valyrian steel needed)
weakness: Kill Night King = all wights die

red_priests.description: Worship Lord of Light (R'hllor), can resurrect dead

greensight.description: Warg into animals, see past/future through weirwood trees

faceless_men.description: Death cult assassins who can change faces

warlocks.description: House of the Undying (Qarth), prophecy & illusions

major_events.name: The King's Arrival
major_events.description: Robert Baratheon visits Winterfell, asks Ned to be Hand of the King
key_discoveries: Bran pushed from tower (saw Cersei & Jaime)
player_choices: Accept Hand position (Ned's path) OR refuse (change history)
Investigate Jon Arryn's death OR ignore

major_events.name: King's Landing Intrigue
major_events.description: Political scheming, Ned discovers Joffrey is bastard of Jaime/Cersei
player_choices: Support Ned's claim (Joffrey illegitimate) OR stay silent
Ally with Littlefinger OR Varys OR neither
Warn Cersei OR confront Robert immediately

consequences.tell_robert: Robert dies before acting, chaos ensues
consequences.stay_silent: Ned executed, War of Five Kings

major_events.name: War of the Five Kings
major_events.description: Ned executed, five claimants fight for Iron Throne
kings: Robb Stark (King in the North, Winterfell)
major_events.player_role: Choose which king to support OR claim throne yourself
major_battles: Battle of Blackwater (Stannis vs Joffrey - wildfire)

major_events.name: Betrayals and Weddings
major_events.description: Red Wedding, Purple Wedding, alliances shift

red_wedding.description: Robb Stark betrayed at Frey wedding feast, massacred with mother Catelyn
red_wedding.trigger: Robb breaks marriage pact with Freys
red_wedding.player_choice: If playing Stark: Keep pact (avoid massacre) OR follow heart (tragic end)
red_wedding.outcome: House Stark nearly destroyed, North submits to Lannisters

purple_wedding.description: Joffrey poisoned at his own wedding to Margaery Tyrell
purple_wedding.player_choice: Frame Tyrion OR reveal truth OR stay silent
purple_wedding.outcome: Tyrion flees to Essos, Tommen becomes king

major_events.name: Mother of Dragons
major_events.description: Daenerys conquers Slaver's Bay, builds army
player_choices: Rule Meereen justly OR return to Westeros immediately
Marry for alliance OR remain independent
challenges: Dothraki khalasar (Drogon burns khal, Dany takes over)

major_events.name: The Long Night
major_events.description: White Walkers breach the Wall, Battle of Winterfell
major_events.trigger: Night King gets ice dragon (Viserion), destroys Wall
battle_phases: Arya kills Night King (or player character if chosen)
major_events.player_choice: Who kills Night King? (Arya canon, but player can claim glory)
major_events.casualties: 50-80% of defenders die (includes major characters randomly)

major_events.name: The Bells
major_events.description: Daenerys vs Cersei, King's Landing burns

options: Burn entire city - Mad Queen path

major_events.elephant_in_room: Wildfire caches explode, causing massive destruction regardless

major_events.name: The Iron Throne
candidates: Sansa Stark (Queen in the North, independent)
Council of Lords (democracy - Bran becomes king)

final_choice.claim_yourself: If you have: 3+ Great Houses, dragons/army, 80+ influence
final_choice.destroy_throne: Melt Iron Throne with dragonfire, end monarchy

legendary_items.name: Longclaw
legendary_items.effect: Can kill White Walkers, +30% vs undead
legendary_items.lore: House Mormont heirloom, given to Jon Snow

legendary_items.name: Oathkeeper & Widow's Wail
legendary_items.lore: Ned Stark's sword melted down by Tywin Lannister

legendary_items.name: Dragon Eggs
legendary_items.effect: Can hatch into dragons (requires fire ritual + Targaryen blood)

legendary_items.name: The Iron Throne
legendary_items.effect: Legitimacy to rule Seven Kingdoms (+100 authority)
legendary_items.lore: Forged from 1,000 swords of Aegon's enemies
legendary_items.danger: Uncomfortable, cuts those who sit (rejects unworthy)

legendary_items.name: Dragonglass (Obsidian)
legendary_items.effect: Kills White Walkers, shatters on impact

legendary_items.name: Wildfire
legendary_items.effect: Green fire, burns on water, extremely volatile

skills_and_abilities.name: Dragon Riding
skills_and_abilities.requirement: Targaryen blood (usually) or dragon bonds with you
skills_and_abilities.effect: Command dragon in battle, aerial combat

skills_and_abilities.name: Face Changing
skills_and_abilities.requirement: Train with Faceless Men, give up identity
skills_and_abilities.effect: Wear faces of dead, perfect disguise

skills_and_abilities.name: Greensight/Warging
skills_and_abilities.effect: See through animals, visions of past/future

skills_and_abilities.name: Shadow Binding
skills_and_abilities.requirement: Red Priest/Priestess, Lord of Light's favor

npcs.name: Jon Snow (Aegon Targaryen)
npcs.title: King in the North, Prince of Dragonstone
npcs.personality: Honorable, brooding, reluctant leader, knows nothing
npcs.arc: Bastard → Night's Watch → Lord Commander → King in the North → Reveal as Targaryen heir
npcs.fate: Canonical: Returns to Night's Watch or player-determined

npcs.name: Daenerys Targaryen
npcs.title: Mother of Dragons, Breaker of Chains, Khaleesi
npcs.arc: Exiled princess → Khaleesi → Slaver's Bane → Mad Queen (potentially)
famous_quotes: I will take what is mine with fire and blood
I am not here to be queen of the ashes

npcs.name: Tyrion Lannister
npcs.title: The Imp, Hand of the Queen
npcs.personality: Witty, cynical, intelligent, drinks and knows things
npcs.arc: Despised dwarf → Hand to Joffrey → Accused of murder → Hand to Daenerys
famous_quotes: I drink and I know things
A Lannister always pays his debts
That's what I do: I drink and I know things

npcs.name: Cersei Lannister
npcs.title: Queen Regent, Lady of Casterly Rock
npcs.prophecy: Gold their crowns, gold their shrouds (all children die)
famous_quotes: When you play the game of thrones, you win or you die

npcs.name: Arya Stark
npcs.title: No One, Assassin
npcs.arc: Noble girl → Fugitive → Faceless apprentice → Stark avenger → Night King slayer

npcs.name: Sansa Stark
npcs.title: Queen in the North
npcs.personality: Resilient, politically savvy, learned from suffering
npcs.arc: Naive girl → Joffrey's victim → Ramsay's victim → Queen in the North
famous_quotes: I'm a slow learner, it's true. But I learn

npcs.name: Jaime Lannister
npcs.title: Kingslayer, Lord Commander of Kingsguard
npcs.arc: Villain → Prisoner → Redemption → Dies with Cersei
npcs.hand_loss: Chapter 3 (Vargo Hoat cuts off right hand, loses combat ability)
famous_quotes: The things I do for love (pushes Bran)
I never cared much for the people, innocent or otherwise

npcs.name: The Night King
npcs.title: Leader of White Walkers
abilities: Immune to fire (but not dragonglass/Valyrian steel)
npcs.death: Valyrian steel dagger to heart (Arya in canon, player can change)

npcs.name: Littlefinger (Petyr Baelish)
npcs.title: Master of Coin, Lord of Harrenhal
schemes: Killed Jon Arryn (started War of Five Kings)
npcs.goal: Climb ladder of chaos to Iron Throne
famous_quotes: Chaos isn't a pit. Chaos is a ladder

npcs.name: Varys (The Spider)
npcs.title: Master of Whisperers
npcs.personality: Enigmatic, claims to serve the realm, information broker
npcs.loyalty: Targaryen → Jon Snow (when Dany goes mad)
famous_quotes: Power resides where men believe it resides

alliances.marriage: Forge alliance via strategic marriage (+50 relations)
alliances.military_pact: Promise troops in exchange for loyalty

betrayal.red_wedding_style: Violate guest right, massacre ally (-100 honor, +fear)
betrayal.frame: Make rival look guilty of crime

endings.name: Targaryen Restoration
endings.requirement: Daenerys or Jon sits Iron Throne, dragons alive
endings.description: Fire and Blood returns, Targaryens rule for generations

endings.name: Northern Independence
endings.requirement: Sansa remains Queen in the North, Seven Kingdoms split
endings.description: The North is free, Winterfell stands

endings.name: Democracy (The Wheel Broken)
endings.requirement: Destroy Iron Throne, establish council of lords
endings.description: Bran becomes elected king, hereditary monarchy ends

endings.name: Mad Queen Reign
endings.requirement: Daenerys burns King's Landing, kills Jon
endings.description: Tyranny of fire, feared but obeyed

endings.name: Night King Victory
endings.requirement: Fail to kill Night King in Chapter 6
endings.description: Long Night eternal, all living become wights - GAME OVER

endings.name: Player Ascension
endings.description: You win the game of thrones through cunning, war, or dragons

endings.name: Littlefinger's Dream
endings.requirement: Betray everyone, eliminate all rivals, sit throne via chaos
endings.description: The ultimate ladder climb - but can you hold it?

endings.name: Apocalypse
endings.requirement: Wildfire caches + dragons = King's Landing destroyed, thousands dead
endings.description: The city of ashes, no throne remains

art_style.description: Dark medieval fantasy, gritty realism, epic scale
scene_examples: Iron Throne room (swords melted into throne)
Battle of Winterfell (night, fire vs ice)
The Wall (700 feet tall ice wall)

examples.name: Chaos is a Ladder
examples.requirement: Betray 5 allies and gain power each time

difficulty_settings.storyteller: No permadeath, easy combat, story focus
difficulty_settings.game_of_thrones: Permadeath enabled, hard choices, political focus (recommended)
difficulty_settings.a_song_of_ice_and_fire: Brutal difficulty, anyone can die anytime, max realism
difficulty_settings.iron_throne: Nightmare mode, one life only (player permadeath)

trivia.author: George R.R. Martin
trivia.book_series: A Song of Ice and Fire (unfinished)
trivia.cultural_impact: Redefined fantasy TV, 'Red Wedding' shocked world
trivia.famous_for: Killing main characters unexpectedly, complex politics, dragons

start_options.option_a: Create your character - choose a Great House and role
start_options.option_b: Play as a canon character (Jon, Daenerys, Tyrion, Arya, Cersei)

playable_canon_characters.name: Jon Snow
playable_canon_characters.role: Lord Commander / King in the North
playable_canon_characters.unique: Targaryen secret heritage, resurrected by Melisandre

playable_canon_characters.name: Tyrion Lannister
playable_canon_characters.unique: Best dialogue in Westeros, impervious to direct combat

playable_canon_characters.name: Arya Stark
playable_canon_characters.unique: Faceless Men training, can change face

playable_canon_characters.name: Cersei Lannister
playable_canon_characters.unique: Control over King's Landing, ruthless ambition

art_direction.visual_style: Dark epic fantasy, HBO series aesthetic
art_direction.color_palette: Desaturated, grey stone, golden throne, blood red
art_direction.character_portraits: Dramatic oil painting style, medieval costume detail
art_direction.battle_scenes: Epic scale battles - Blackwater, Bastards, Winterfell
